Deland Restaurant Health Grades

59%Grade A

Every one of the 27 restaurants in Deland on this page carries an A–F health grade built from its latest Florida DBPR inspection. 16 hold an A, and the typical diner rating runs 4.2 stars. The list runs best grade first.

Deland restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Deland restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 27 Deland restaurants we grade, 16 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Deland restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Deland?

We currently publish 27 graded restaurants in Deland, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 16 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
